items.creator: @uj_korean
items.title:
R to @uj_korean: 공감할만한 내용이라 옮긴다.🥲

- 나는 싸우고 싶지 않았습니다. 
- 나는 ReFi가 거짓말을 기반으로 설립된다면 성공할 것이라고 믿지 않기 때문에 진실이 알려지기를 원했습니다.
- 그러나 아무도 진실을 밝히고 싶지 않아했습니다.

items.creator: @SkiTownRE
items.title: R to @aussieflya: And a good reason why they probably like the reliability of the I/O structure.  Little incentive to prepay with that length of term and a refi likely increases principal amount.

items.creator: @tvolpe97
items.title: R to @JCacciapaglia: Napkin math is important.. but the model should take wayyy more into account than just basic cash flow. Napkin method isn't accounting for capital improvments, its not laying out a budget of cash flow over a ten yr period. Doesn't show what time is most idea to refi/sell, etc
